purpose: Publish reusable community, support, and meta-contribution materials around SignalGuard.

materials.title: SignalGuard Builder Networking Kit
materials.audience: GenLayer builders, reviewers, and ecosystem partners
materials.purpose: Provide a concise one-page explanation, review links, and conversation prompts for introducing SignalGuard.
materials.boundary: This is a public networking kit, not a claim of attendee counts or social engagement.

materials.title: SignalGuard Community Outreach FAQ Pack
materials.audience: Builders asking how to inspect or adapt a source-grounded contract
materials.purpose: Give short answers and links that can be reused when explaining SignalGuard to the community.
artifacts: Safety notes about rewards and review
materials.boundary: This is outreach material, not evidence of fake engagement or mass posting.

materials.title: SignalGuard Community Support Triage Guide
materials.audience: Builders debugging Portal submissions or SignalGuard review flows
materials.purpose: Help users route common support questions to project evidence, Portal status checks, or manual wallet actions.
materials.boundary: This is support documentation, not a promise to operate official GenLayer support.

materials.title: SignalGuard Portal Evidence Workflow Retrospective
materials.audience: Portal reviewers and builders planning contribution evidence
materials.purpose: Summarize the evidence workflow, guardrails, and lessons learned from packaging SignalGuard submissions.
materials.boundary: This is a process contribution about improving submission quality, not a request to bypass review.
